description: Learn how to stir fry vegetables and proteins quickly and effectively.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: vegetables, protein, and stir fry sauce.
Cut all ingredients into uniform pieces for even cooking.
Heat a wok or large pan over high heat until hot.
Add oil to the pan and swirl to coat.
Add protein first and cook until browned, then remove from the pan.
Add vegetables to the pan and stir fry for 2-3 minutes.
Return the protein to the pan, add sauce, and stir to combine.
Serve immediately with rice or noodles.
